summary: Iteration 3 retest: Profile logout fix CONFIRMED WORKING on web; Cart buy-now smoke CONFIRMED WORKING (no regression). Both remaining items from iteration 2 now pass.
critical_code_review_comments: profile.tsx: Pressable + inlined onPress with window.confirm on web works reliably. This pattern is recommended over the previous TouchableOpacity+outer-closure approach for web-critical handlers.

Non-blocking deprecation warnings persist across screens: 'shadow* style props are deprecated (use boxShadow)', 'Image.style.resizeMode deprecated (use props.resizeMode)', 'props.pointerEvents deprecated (use style.pointerEvents)'. Safe to fix in a follow-up cleanup pass; no functional impact.

success_rate.backend: not retested (out of scope for frontend-only request)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (2/2 retested fixes pass): profile logout PASS, cart buy-now PASS

seed_data_creation: Re-seeded Mongo user_sessions doc {session_token: test_session_arthub_01, user_id: user_arthub_test01, expires_at: +7d} before each auth-gated test pass. Cmd: mongosh test_database --eval 'db.user_sessions.deleteMany(...); db.user_sessions.insertOne(...)'.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Viewport 420x900. Auth bypass: goto '/', then localStorage.setItem('session_token','test_session_arthub_01'), then navigate to target route. Confirm dialogs on web must be auto-accepted via page.on('dialog', async d => await d.accept()); use asyncio.create_task for page.click with no_wait_after=True because the beforeunload/confirm flow can stall click resolution. Profile logout fires window.confirm('Log out of ArtHub?') -> on accept: signOut() clears local state + calls /api/auth/logout + router.replace('/login'). Cart buy-now path: click art-card-seed-1 -> artwork-add-to-cart -> /cart -> cart-buy-now-btn -> clearCart then Alert -> router.push('/(tabs)'); revisit /cart to assert cart-empty present and cart-buy-now-btn + cart-total absent. Mongo session is deleted by /api/auth/logout, so re-seed before any subsequent auth test.
rca_of_issue: Root cause of iteration 2 logout failure was likely a stale-closure / hoisting interaction in the outer `doLogout` function (declared inside component body but captured by the TouchableOpacity onClick at first render). Fix applied by main agent: replaced TouchableOpacity with Pressable AND inlined the handler at the onPress site (onPress={() => { const run = async () => {...}; if (Platform.OS==='web') { const ok = window.confirm(...); if (ok) run(); return; } Alert.alert(...) }}). Verified: confirm dialog fires, URL transitions to /login, localStorage.session_token cleared to null, login-google-button renders. No regression on cart checkout flow.

logout: Navigate to /profile, wait for profile-screen, verify name='Test Artist' and email='artist@arthub.test'
Click profile-logout-btn (force=True, no_wait_after=True); dialog handler accepts 'Log out of ArtHub?'
Assertions: URL ends with /login ✓, localStorage.session_token === null ✓, login-google-button visible ✓
cart_buy_now: Navigate to home tabs, click art-card-seed-1
Navigate to /cart; verify cart-buy-now-btn present and cart-total=$120.00
Click cart-buy-now-btn; accept Alert dialog; URL redirects to /(tabs)
Re-navigate to /cart; assert cart-empty present and cart-buy-now-btn + cart-total absent ✓
